objective: Validate one real KMA UM global N128 operational-forecast issue before any bulk external-data collection.
prerequisite: KMA_API_KEY must be set locally to the current user's own APIHub key; never accept or store a key in task payloads, CLI arguments, logs, or artifacts.
acceptance: real response contains both GRIB variable codes 2002 and 2003
raw file and redacted source sidecar hashes match
forecast initialization plus conservative 12-hour publication delay is no later than data_available_kst_dtm
hourly targets are bracketed by source leads and contain no missing values
manifest passes external-data checksum and causality validation
on_success: Collect 2024 only, run the KMA-vs-GFS disagreement control screen, and open H2 exactly once after Q2 passes all score components.
on_failure: Fail closed, retain only the redacted response diagnostic, and do not collect 2024 or create a submission.
